title: Midnight Nebula
description: A dark sky overlay compatible with Optifine/Skyboxify!
body: ![LogoBanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5972cfef1dfbb6084c0917e95f13d414b5ebbeb9_0.webp) # Midnight Nebula ![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/midnight-nebula?style=for-the-badge) ![Modrinth Game Versions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/midnight-nebula?style=for-the-badge) > In this sky overlay, there is a dark sky with many stars in the distance. A bright, white sun also appears in the sky with some nebulae. > Recommended: Turn off Sun & Moon [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/M4M61V7YTQ) ### Issue? Let me know on Discord!
